def shot(page, name: str, label: str = ""):
    path = f"{name}.png"
    try:
        page.screenshot(path=path, timeout=5000)
        tag = f" — {label}" if label else ""
        log(f"📸 {path}{tag}")
    except Exception:
        log(f"  ⚠️ screenshot '{path}' timeout — continuando", level="WARN")

def ask_opp_id_gui() -> str:
    root = tk.Tk()
    root.withdraw()
    root.lift()
    root.attributes("-topmost", True)
    opp_id = simpledialog.askstring(
        title="SAP CRM — Búsqueda de Oportunidad",
        prompt="Ingrese No. de Oportunidad:",
        parent=root,
    )
    root.destroy()
    return opp_id.strip() if opp_id else ""

def ask_num_partes_gui() -> int:
    root = tk.Tk()
    root.withdraw()
    root.lift()
    root.attributes("-topmost", True)
    result = simpledialog.askinteger(
        title="SAP CRM — Partes",

ttributes("-topmost", True)
    result = simpledialog.askinteger(
        title="SAP CRM — Partes",
        prompt="Ingrese Cuantos No. de Parte Ingresara:",
        minvalue=1, maxvalue=200,
        parent=root,
    )
    root.destroy()
    return result if result else 0

text=f"Ingrese los {count} Numeros de parte:\n(uno por linea)",

    txt = tk.Text(win, width=35, height=max(count + 2, 4), font=("Courier", 11))
    txt.pack(padx=20, pady=5)
    txt.focus_set()

    tk.Button(win, text="OK", width=12, command=on_ok, font=("Arial", 11)).pack(pady=10)
    win.mainloop()
    return parts
